summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR is classified independently. No close, merge, fix, or label mutation is recommended from the hydrated state.

actions.reason: Active feature PR with supplied proof and focused implementation. It is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or safe close candidate in this inventory shard.
